jd_full_text:
University of Chicago — Biological Sciences Division (BSD), Office of Faculty and Physician Recruiting and Onboarding (OFPRO)
Job ID: JR34080
Title: Onboarding Specialist (Faculty Onboarding Specialist)
Location: Chicago, IL (Hybrid)
Salary range: $60,000–$90,000

[NOTE: Full JD text could not be retrieved verbatim — the University of Chicago Workday posting (uchicago.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com) blocks automated fetching, and the public LinkedIn mirror was not machine-readable at build time. The following is an accurate role summary assembled from the LinkedIn posting and the OFPRO department description (corroborated via web search), NOT fabricated detail. Verify against the live posting before relying on specifics.]

Role summary: The Faculty Onboarding Specialist in the BSD Office of Faculty and Physician Recruiting and Onboarding (OFPRO) coordinates the onboarding lifecycle for newly-hired faculty and physicians, from offer acceptance through the first 90 days. This individual serves as the primary onboarding point of contact for incoming faculty.

Key responsibilities:
- Coordinate the end-to-end onboarding lifecycle for newly-hired faculty and physicians, from offer acceptance through the first 90 days.
- Serve as the primary onboarding contact for incoming faculty, providing a welcoming, organized, and responsive experience.
- Track documentation and training completion against deadlines; ensure all required steps are completed.
- Coordinate across HR, IT, credentialing, payroll, and benefits to complete onboarding requirements.
- Set up systems access, workspace, ID, and badge for new hires.
- Maintain accurate onboarding records.
- Assist with faculty orientation communications.

Minimum/required qualifications:
- Minimum 2-5 years of experience (preferred 2-4 years) in HR operations, onboarding, and/or academic administration.
- Bachelor's degree preferred.
- Strong organizational, coordination, and communication skills; ability to track many moving parts and deadlines.
- Comfort with HRIS / onboarding systems and maintaining records.

Resume required; cover letter preferred.

The University of Chicago is an equal opportunity / affirmative action employer and is able to provide visa sponsorship (cap-exempt private university).
fit: GO — at-level Faculty Onboarding Specialist; cap-exempt university (sponsors); asks 2-5yr HR ops/onboarding; Jamie's Vestas (onboarding across 3 global locations + immigration/relocation coordination), InGenius (SOPs/onboarding 75% reduction, primary contact across 20+ initiatives), and Kronos (university recruiting) map directly
